settings.heading: Real Estate AI Agent
settings.intro: An always-on operations teammate for modern real estate teams — handling inquiry response, daily market intelligence, and repetitive admin workflows.

settings.title: Smart inquiry email handling
settings.description: Monitors inbound email and automatically responds to in-scope property inquiries using approved property data and current inspection details.

settings.title: Human-in-the-loop approvals
settings.description: When context is missing or a decision is needed, it asks in DM before acting. Private inspection requests are checked against calendar availability then run past the agent before confirmation.

settings.title: Daily market movement reporting
settings.description: Scans target postcodes and compares against yesterday to flag newly listed, removed, and price-changed properties in Slack/email reports.

settings.title: Listing and inspection awareness
settings.description: Tracks listing and inspection changes so the assistant stays aligned with what is currently live in market.

settings.title: Action-taking assistant
settings.description: Can complete real web/computer tasks on demand — CRM updates, portal checks, and routine operational actions while agents are on the move.

settings.title: Automated social content workflows
settings.description: Connected to templated API and social templates so listing and sold content can be produced quickly and consistently.
